overall.description: First-person exploration of a cyberpunk bar/club from Cyberpunk 2077, featuring vibrant green and red neon lighting, digital advertisements, and NPCs. The player character walks through the main bar area, observes patrons at a back booth, traverses a corridor with holographic signs, and enters a restroom with blue fluorescent lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: cyberpunk bar entrance with neon-lit staircase and main counter

events.description: finishes ascending stairs and begins walking along the bar counter
moving from the bar counter area toward the open seating area

agents.ego_description: walking up illuminated stairs and moving along the curved neon-lit bar counter, observing the bartender and surroundings

notable_agents.action: bartender standing behind the counter facing the bar

entered.detail: stairs with bright green neon edge lighting leading up to the bar
curved bar counter with continuous bright green neon strip lighting along the edge
white modern bar stools lined along the counter
large vertical digital screen displaying promotional content on the wall
backlit shelves with bottles behind the bar counter

segments.scene_description: The segment begins with a first-person view ascending a staircase illuminated by green neon lights. The camera moves along a curved bar counter featuring bright green neon strips, white bar stools, and a digital advertisement screen on the left wall. A bartender stands behind the counter as the camera explores the main bar area.

scene_state.functional_zone: back seating area with circular booth and holographic advertisements

events.description: slows down and approaches the group seated at the round table
holographic advertisements flicker and change content above the seating area

agents.ego_description: approaching and observing a group of patrons seated at a round table in a booth area, watching their interactions

notable_agents.action: seated patron gesturing with hands while conversing
seated patron leaning forward on the table listening

entered.detail: circular table with bottles and drinks in the center of the booth area
curved padded booth seating with green neon floor lighting
floating holographic display showing changing advertisements above the seating

segments.scene_description: The camera moves from the bar counter to a back seating area featuring a circular booth with green neon floor lighting. Two patrons are seated at a round table with drinks, one gesturing while talking. Holographic advertisements float above the seating area, and the bar counter remains visible in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: corridor with digital posters and neon signage leading to restrooms

events.description: red neon lighting becomes more prominent in the corridor ahead
approaching the restroom entrance with blue light visible inside

agents.ego_description: walking through the back corridor passing digital posters and neon signs, heading toward the restroom area

entered.detail: vertical digital poster displaying a muscular figure with promotional text
wall-mounted green neon sign shaped like a stylized figure
red neon strips illuminating the ceiling and walls of the corridor
doorway leading to restroom with visible blue lighting inside

segments.scene_description: The camera moves through a corridor lined with digital posters and neon signage. A green neon figure sign is mounted on the left wall while a digital poster of a muscular figure appears on the right. Red neon lighting illuminates the far end of the corridor as the camera approaches a restroom entrance with blue light visible inside.

scene_state.functional_zone: restroom with blue fluorescent lighting and brick walls

events.description: enters the restroom with distinct blue fluorescent lighting
lighting shifts from warm neon to cool blue fluorescent as camera moves deeper into restroom

agents.ego_description: entering the restroom and approaching the sink area where a person is washing their hands

notable_agents.action: person standing at sink washing hands and looking in mirror

entered.detail: long counter with multiple white sinks and large mirrors above
cool blue overhead fluorescent light fixtures illuminating the space
exposed dark brick wall texture along the left side
wall-mounted dispenser with paper towels next to the sinks

segments.scene_description: The camera enters a restroom with cool blue fluorescent lighting, contrasting with the warm neon of the bar area. The space features a long sink counter with mirrors, exposed brick walls, and a person washing their hands at the sink. The camera explores the restroom interior, showing the fixtures and tiled flooring.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from a neon-lit entryway into the intimate social hub of a cyberpunk bar. It begins by ascending a staircase bathed in green neon light, gliding past a curved bar counter lined with white stools and a digital advertisement screen. As the camera moves away from the bartender and the main counter, the space opens up into a more secluded seating area. The scene then shifts toward a circular booth where green neon floor lighting illuminates two patrons engaged in conversation over drinks. Finally, the perspective settles on the interaction within the booth while holographic advertisements float overhead, with the glow of the main bar remaining visible in the background.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a vibrant, neon-lit corridor into the sterile, cool atmosphere of a restroom. It begins by gliding through a hallway lined with digital posters and a green neon figure sign, while red lighting glows at the far end of the passage. As the camera approaches the restroom entrance, the warm neon hues give way to a sharp transition into cool blue fluorescent lighting. The scene then opens into the restroom interior, shifting from the narrow corridor to a space featuring exposed brick walls and a long sink counter with mirrors. Finally, the camera explores the tiled flooring and fixtures, passing a person washing their hands at the sink.
